meanings.definition: used to wrap around pipes or boilers or laid in attics to prevent loss of heat
hang (back) or fall (behind) in movement, progress, development, etc.
lock up or confine, in or as in a jail
examples: The suspects were imprisoned without trial
the murderer was incarcerated for the rest of his life

meanings.definition: throw or pitch at a mark, as with coins
cover with lagging to prevent heat loss
